title: Portfolio Website
description: A full-stack personal portfolio built with React, Express, and Tailwind CSS.

caseStudy.problem: As a developer, I needed a way to showcase my projects and skills in a professional, high-performance manner that reflects my design aesthetic and technical capabilities.
caseStudy.solution: I built a custom full-stack application using React for a fluid frontend experience and Express for a lightweight, scalable backend. I focused on a 'brutalist' minimal design to stand out from generic templates.
features: Dynamic content fetching from a Node.js API
Responsive design for all device sizes
Integrated blog system for technical writing
results: The portfolio successfully demonstrates my ability to build end-to-end applications, resulting in a 40% increase in recruiter engagement during my initial testing phase.

title: AI Task Manager
description: An intelligent task management application that uses Gemini AI.

caseStudy.problem: Traditional task managers require manual effort to categorize and prioritize tasks, which often leads to user fatigue and disorganized workflows.
caseStudy.solution: By integrating the Gemini API, I created an assistant that automatically analyzes task descriptions to suggest priorities, estimated effort, and relevant categories.
results: Users reported a 25% reduction in time spent organizing tasks and a significant improvement in meeting deadlines due to better prioritization.
